---
title: "Edward Armitage"
---

## Edward Armitage

**Dates:** (1817-1896)

### Description

painter

### Biography

illustrator of CMY’s <i>The Pupils of St. John the Divine</i>.

### Letters

- Letter from March 7th [1869]
- Letter from Jan [<i>illegible</i>] 1868
- Letter from Nov: 1.1867.
- Letter from July 17. 1867
- Letter from July 12 1867
- Letter from July 9th [1867]
- Letter from June 29. 1867.
- Letter from June 27 1867

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
